Hero.subtitle: Your partner for discreet and direct real estate sales.

About.description_1: As a private investor with over 25 years of experience, I act independently and personally. My focus is on the sustainable development of a property portfolio.
About.description_2: I guarantee you a discreet transaction at eye level – without brokers, without unnecessary bureaucracy, but with maximum reliability.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Binding commitments and adherence to deadlines

Process.description: We reduce complexity to the essentials. A lean, transparent process from the first valuation to immediate payment.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Send us the key data. We will check it immediately and confidentially.

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.desc: Viewing and market-based valuation of your property within 48h.

offer.title: Offer
offer.desc: You will receive a binding purchase offer without financing reservation.

closing.title: Closing
closing.desc: Fast notarization and immediate purchase price payment.

type.title: Property Type
type.desc: Exclusively apartment buildings and residential portfolios

condition.title: Condition
condition.desc: From well-maintained existing buildings to properties in need of renovation

law.title: Building Rights
law.value: Open, achievable in short term or existing

Footer.copyright: © 2026 Hendrik Grau Investment. All rights reserved.

Contact.description: Do you own a property that fits our profile? Fill out the form or call us directly. We guarantee a discreet review.

Carousel.title: Selected Projects
Carousel.description: An insight into our portfolio of successfully realized residential projects and existing developments.

purchase.title: Purchase
purchase.desc: We focus on the quick and discreet purchase of apartment buildings. We carefully examine and focus primarily on the potential benefits.

development.title: Development
development.desc: We develop sustainable concepts to increase the value of the acquired properties. We create added value for the real estate market and the tenants.

holding.title: Portfolio Management
holding.desc: Maintaining properties and preserving them for future generations is our declared goal. Reliability and value retention are our focus.

company_section.title: Grau Group
company_section.description: A strong network. We cover the entire value chain – from acquisition to portfolio management.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions.

broker_fees.question: Are there broker fees?
broker_fees.answer: No. Since we buy directly as private investors, there are no broker commissions for you. The sale is commission-free for you.

purchase_speed.question: How quickly can you buy?
purchase_speed.answer: Since we have secured financing, we can usually attend the notary appointment within 2-4 weeks after agreement.

renovation_objects.question: Do you also buy properties in need of renovation?
renovation_objects.answer: Yes, absolutely. We specialize in the development of real estate and also buy properties with maintenance backlogs or vacancies.

FAQ.cta_text: Do you have any further questions?

t1.quote: The collaboration with Mr. Grau was characterized by absolute professionalism and reliability. The transaction was completed quickly and discreetly.
t1.name: Dr. Hans-Peter Müller

t2.quote: We appreciate the transparent communication and fair valuation. We can recommend Mr. Grau without reservation.
t2.name: Sabine Schmidt

t3.quote: A partner at eye level. The entire process was handled with the utmost discretion and efficiency.
t3.name: Thomas Becker
